title: Fit decision — which fit-plan option was applied, and who chose it
description: Written by scripts/decideFit.mjs. `source` says WHO decided (ledger = the customer's own prompt already answered it; auto = no interactive UI exists yet, so the recommended, non-destructive default was applied; user is reserved for the future interactive gate). A zero-length decisionWindow means nobody was asked — never dressed up as a deadline the customer was given.

optionId.description: The fit-plan option id that was applied (or "balanced" when there was nothing to decide).

musicMode.description: Present when the decision changes how the track is used; absent when it does not (e.g. keep_all).
